narrative:
Twin  Twp township has 2,941 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.8 percentage points.
